svg.title: 9-hour hackathon battle plan for olive leaf voice assistant
svg.desc: Timeline showing 5 phases across 9 hours with tech stack and jury scoring breakdown
svg.text: 9-hour battle plan — olive leaf voice assistant

g.text: Clone Whisper + edge-tts · Download FAO/EPPO PDFs · Chunk + embed with multilingual model (paraphrase-multilingual)
Fine-tune MobileNetV3 on PlantVillage olive subset · Data augmentation (blur, crop, rotate) · Export to TFLite
Target: ≥85% on 3 diseases · Classes: peacock eye, anthracnose, verticillium
Strict RAG: score threshold ≥ 0.75 → answer · below threshold → polite refusal in darija
Prompt: "You MUST only use context below. If absent, say: ما عنديش معلومة في هذا الموضوع"
Whisper-large ASR (Tunisian darija) · edge-tts Arabic voice · Camera API → CNN → RAG → TTS
PWA with manifest + service worker · Deploy on Vercel/Render · Mobile-first UI
Run jury test: 5 corpus Q, 3 disease photos, 3 trap Q · Measure latency · Fix edge cases
Prepare offline fallback · Add source citation UI · Practice live demo script

svg.text: Jury scoring — where to win and where not to lose

g.text: Critical rule — hardcoded in the LLM system prompt
"Never answer from training data. If the context score is below 0.75, respond only:
ما عنديش معلومة كافية — رجع لمستشار زراعي"
